title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Phoenix Mills in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
